title: arrhenatherum delavayi
intro: Arrhenatherum delavayi, also known as the Chinese silver hairgrass or Chinese oat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Arrhenatherum delavayi include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water.
